g.text: "How should one know and see for the immediate wearing away of the taints?"
kathaṁ nu kho jānato kathaṁ passato anantarā āsavānaṁ khayo hoti
These regardings, views, as well as doubt are intentional constructs (saṅkhārā)
WHEN TOUCHED BY A FEELING BORN OF IGNORANCE-CONTACT
When an uninstructed ordinary person is touched, craving arises · an intentional construct is born from that craving
phuṭṭhassa assutavato puthujjanassa uppannā taṇhā; tatojo so saṅkhāro
It is impermanent · conditioned · dependently arisen
THE DIFFERENCE IS IN KNOWING AND SEEING
the arising of construct as dependently arisen from ignorance-contact
Sees an essence in the construct born of ignorance-contact
By seeing the construct as impermanent · conditioned · dependently arisen
